home.title: Delivery Rules
home.welcome_subtitle: Manage zones, rates, and the carrier service for checkout in one place.
home.plan_free_sub: Upgrade for more zones and rules
home.plan_inactive_sub: Start your 7-day free trial to unlock features
home.setup_desc: Complete these steps for the carrier service to work correctly.
home.step_zones_desc: Create zones by department with service rates.
home.step_default_desc: Configure a fallback rate for departments without a zone.
home.step_carrier_desc: Register the carrier service from the Shipping Rules screen.
home.no_rates_warning: No rates configured. Create zones and rates in Shipping Rules.
home.how_step1_desc: Create rates by department, city, schedule and delivery method.
home.how_step2_desc: Shopify calls this endpoint at checkout to get available rates.
home.how_step3_desc: The customer sees only the rate matching their selected method and location.

shipping.title: Shipping rules by city
shipping.subtitle: Configure rates with municipality restrictions. These rules apply at checkout (carrier service).
shipping.default_desc: This rate applies when the destination does not have a specific zone configured. It is the fallback for departments without their own rules.
shipping.default_warning: No default rate configured. Departments without a specific zone will have no shipping options at checkout.
shipping.city_match_hint: How closely the buyer must spell the city to homologate it (50–100%). 100% = exact. The variants/nicknames you set per city also count.
shipping.no_rates_zone: No rates configured for this zone.
shipping.name: Name
shipping.origin_warehouse_hint: If you pick a warehouse, this rate only applies when the order ships from it (Shopify decides fulfillment by inventory). "All" = applies to any origin.
shipping.zones_list_empty: No zones yet. Add a department below.
shipping.new_rate_pick_depts: Which departments does this rate apply to?
shipping.new_rate_no_zones: Add a department first in the Zones tab.
shipping.new_rate_no_catalog: This market has no department catalog. Add it manually in the Zones tab.
shipping.schedule_hint: Leave empty for available all day.
shipping.days_hint: If none selected, applies every day.
shipping.zone_names_desc: In Shopify Admin → Shipping and delivery → Shipping profile, the name of each zone determines what shipping type it generates:
shipping.zone_express: Name contains "express" → classified as express shipping
shipping.zone_envio: Name contains "envio" or "casa" (without "express") → classified as standard shipping
shipping.zone_caution: "Envio Express" counts as express, not standard. If a warehouse needs both services, create two separate zones: one "Express" and one "Envio a Casa".
shipping.advanced_desc: Storefront and checkout integrations sync automatically. Use these only if something looks out of sync (e.g. carrier missing in Shopify settings, theme not showing rules).
shipping.sync_desc: Force-republish rules to the public metafield. Normally not needed — sync runs automatically on every save.
shipping.carrier_desc: Re-create or repair the Delivery Rules carrier service in Shopify. Auto-registered on install — only use if carrier is missing.
shipping.csv_desc: Bulk upload of zones and rates. Zones are created automatically. Format: department, rate_name, service_type, price, city_condition, cities, description, from_time, to_time, days
shipping.csv_pro_only: CSV import and export are included in the Pro plan.
shipping.rate_locked_pro: This rate uses Pro-only options (weight/cart tiers, schedule, or product tags). Upgrade or delete it and create a flat-rate rule.
shipping.limit_rates_per_zone_ui: You've reached your plan's maximum rates per zone.
shipping.limit_zones_ui: You've reached your plan's maximum number of zones.
shipping.exclude_tags: All products except with these tags
shipping.zone_services_desc: Choose which delivery methods can be configured for this department. Pre-selected based on your Shopify Locations.
shipping.required_name: Name — what the customer sees at checkout (e.g. "Express Shipping").
shipping.required_service: Service type — choose between standard, express, or pickup.
shipping.required_price: Price ({{currency}}) — flat rate, or set up tiers by weight or cart total.
shipping.required_optional_hint: Other fields (city, schedule, days, product tags) are optional and let you fine-tune when this rate applies.
shipping.delivery_hint: Calendar days from purchase. Shopify shows the date range under the rate at checkout.
shipping.per_item_hint: Total = first item + additional × (units − 1). E.g. 10 + 2 × 2 = 14 for 3 units.
shipping.duplicate_zone_label: Duplicate zone with its rates to:
shipping.default_country_note: These default rates apply ONLY to destinations in {{country}} without a configured zone.
shipping.zone_currency_note: Prices in this zone are charged in {{currency}} (your shop currency). Shopify converts them to the customer's currency automatically when using Markets.
shipping.csv_help_title: How to fill the CSV — column guide
shipping.csv_help_intro: Each row is one rate. The zone (region + country) is created automatically if missing. Only the first 4 fields are required; the rest can be empty.
shipping.csv_help_tip_quotes: Values containing commas go in double quotes: "MEDELLÍN,ENVIGADO".
shipping.csv_help_tip_empty: Empty field = no restriction / default value.
shipping.csv_help_tip_values_field: product_tags holds the condition values (tags, vendors, SKUs, collections or types) depending on product_field.
shipping.csv_col_0: Zone region/state. Creates the zone if it doesn't exist.
shipping.csv_col_1: Name shown at checkout. Different names = separate options.
shipping.csv_col_3: Flat price in your shop currency (only used when pricing_mode = flat).
shipping.csv_col_4: City filter: all, only listed, or exclude listed.
shipping.csv_col_5: Filter cities, comma separated, in quotes.
shipping.csv_col_6: Optional text shown under the rate.
shipping.csv_col_7: Time window when the rate is available (empty = always).
shipping.csv_col_9: How the price is computed: flat, weight ranges, or cart total ranges.
shipping.csv_col_10: Weight ranges in kg with price, separated by semicolons.
shipping.csv_col_11: Cart total ranges. max 0 = no cap; price 0 = free shipping.
shipping.csv_col_12: Product condition: apply only if it matches, or exclude when it matches.
shipping.csv_col_14: Delivery estimate in calendar days (Shopify shows dates at checkout).
shipping.csv_col_15: Product attribute to compare: tags, vendor, type, collection or SKU.
shipping.csv_col_16: any = one cart item is enough; all = every item must match.
shipping.csv_col_17: Zone country (2-letter code). Empty = your shop country.
shipping.csv_col_18: Origin warehouse (exact Location name). Empty = applies to any origin. Display/scope only, does not force fulfillment.
shipping.csv_col_19: City aliases for checkout matching. Format CANONICAL>alias1|alias2, separate cities with ;

action.zone_services_empty: Select at least one service for the zone.

csv.min_rows: CSV must have at least a header and one data row
csv.missing_fields: Row {{n}}: missing fields (minimum: department, name, service_type, price)
csv.invalid_service: Row {{n}}: service type "{{code}}" is not valid (use: mox_envio, mox_express or mox_pickup)

billing.title: Plans & Pricing
billing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business.
billing.free_desc: Ideal for stores getting started with basic shipping rules.
billing.pro_desc: For stores that need full control over rates and coverage.
billing.trial_info: Shopify won't charge you for the first 7 days. After that, $19.99 USD/month unless you cancel.
billing.needs_subscription_desc: Start the 7-day trial to use all app features. Shopify will not charge you until the trial period ends.
billing.trial_active_desc: No charge has been made yet. After the trial ends, $19.99 USD/month will be billed.
billing.redirect_fallback_link: Click here to continue to Shopify
billing.managed_by_shopify_desc: Your subscription and trial are handled by Shopify. You'll be prompted to choose a plan from the Shopify App Store when one is available.
billing.limit_zones: You've reached the {{max}} zones limit on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
billing.limit_rates: You've reached the {{max}} rates per zone limit on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro to add more.
billing.limit_feature: This feature is available on the Pro plan.
billing.sponsored_cannot_downgrade: This Pro access is assigned by the Delivery Rules team. Contact support to change plans.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.subtitle: Log of every checkout rate request plus a test simulator. Retention: {{days}} days.
quotes.sim_desc: Test which rates a customer will see without a real checkout. Runs the exact same engine as checkout.
quotes.pickup_mismatch: Blocked: cart has pickup in "{{dept}}" but the destination is a different region.
quotes.empty_log: No quotes logged yet. They will appear here when a customer reaches checkout or when you use the simulator.
quotes.no_decisions: No rules were evaluated (no zone for the destination and no default rates).
quotes.sim_product_attrs: Test product attributes (vendor, SKU, type, collection)
